title: caladenia flavovirens
intro: Caladenia flavovirens, also known as the yellow-green spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. The plant is primarily used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of Caladenia flavovirens include its ability to boost the immune system and act as an antiseptic, making it effective in treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in tea form or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
